error_signature: no variables are addressable from within the Bearer Auth credentials
title: MCP Client Bearer Auth token not passing
symptom: The MCP Client node fails to pass a Bearer token fetched from a previous HTTP Request node, resulting in authentication issues.
applies_when: Fetching Bearer token from a previous node
not_this_if: Bearer token is hardcoded in the credentials
root_cause: The Bearer Auth credentials in the MCP Client node do not automatically recognize or allow the use of dynamic variables from previous nodes, which prevents the token fetched from being utilized.
fix_steps: Open the MCP Client node settings
Use expressions to reference the output of the HTTP Request node that fetches the Bearer token
Test the workflow to ensure the token is passed correctly
agent_instruction: Reference the Bearer token from the FetchToken node using expressions in the MCP Client node settings.
